title: Common Definitions Schema
description: Standard reusable definitions supporting internationalization, advanced media assets, call-to-actions, and metadata.

LocalizedString.description: Localized text object to support multi-language content translation.

LocalizedTextarea.description: Localized block of long text supporting rich descriptions or line breaks.

MediaAsset.description: Rich media representation for assets managed under high-quality CMS workflow.

url.description: The public-facing CDN absolute address of the asset.

alt.description: Accessibility text description, essential for SEO and screen-readers.

width.description: Original structural image width in pixels.

height.description: Original structural image height in pixels.

focalPoint.description: The alignment index used for custom crop presets without losing region of interest.

caption.description: Optional photographer caption or copyright notice.

LinkCTA.description: Standardized interaction element representing buttons and linkages.

url.description: Navigation anchoring target destination, including #sections, absolute URLs, or sub-paths.

isExternal.description: Whether to launch the linked resource in a clean external tab with secure headers.

SEOConfig.description: Deep audit capabilities for target indexing and organic crawler configurations.

metaTitle.description: Primary SEO title displayed on tabs and search summaries. Keep below 60 chars.

metaDescription.description: Search engine text snippet. Keep below 155-160 characters for maximum view integrity.

keywords.description: Target indexing keywords matching search queries.

openGraph.description: Rich content injection properties for sharing previews on social streams.

canonicalUrl.description: Preferred absolute URL routing address pointing to primary asset node.

SectionMeta.description: Standard wrapper configuration wrapping section layouts.
